sentences.target: Ich suche gerade eine neue Beschäftigung.

translations.de: Ich suche gerade eine neue Beschäftigung.
translations.en: I’m currently looking for a new job.
translations.tr: Şu anda yeni bir iş arıyorum.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث حالياً عن عمل جديد.
translations.nl: Ik ben op zoek naar een nieuwe baan.
translations.hi: मैं अभी नई नौकरी ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en ny jobb.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter ett nytt jobb.
translations.ro: Caut un nou loc de muncă.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter et nyt job.
translations.ja: 今、新しい仕事を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object.
Temporal/aspectual adverb modifying the verb phrase (‘right now’).
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Beschäftigung’.
Attributive adjective, feminine accusative singular (mixed inflection after ‘eine’); modifies ‘Beschäftigung’.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of ‘suche’.

sentences.target: Lisa hat endlich eine feste Beschäftigung gefunden.

translations.de: Lisa hat endlich eine feste Beschäftigung gefunden.
translations.en: Lisa has finally found a steady job.
translations.es: Lisa por fin consiguió un trabajo fijo.
translations.fr: Lisa a enfin trouvé un emploi stable.
translations.it: Lisa ha finalmente trovato un lavoro stabile.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎终于找到了一份稳定的工作。
translations.yue: Lisa 終於搵到一份穩定嘅工作。
translations.pt: Lisa finalmente conseguiu um emprego fixo.
translations.he: ליסה סוף סוף מצאה עבודה קבועה.
translations.tr: Lisa sonunda düzenli bir iş buldu.
translations.vi: Lisa cuối cùng cũng tìm được một công việc ổn định.
translations.nl: Lisa heeft eindelijk een vaste baan gevonden.
translations.hu: Lisa végre talált egy állandó munkát.
translations.hi: लीसा को आखिरकार स्थायी नौकरी मिल गई.
translations.pl: Lisa w końcu znalazła stałą pracę.
translations.el: Η Λίζα βρήκε επιτέλους μια σταθερή δουλειά.
translations.nb: Lisa har endelig fått en fast jobb.
translations.sv: Lisa har äntligen fått ett fast jobb.
translations.ro: Lisa și-a găsit în sfârșit un job stabil.
translations.da: Lisa har endelig fået et fast job.
translations.fi: Lisa on vihdoin saanut vakituisen työn.
translations.ja: リサはついに安定した仕事を見つけた。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; subject of the clause (nominative singular).
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the perfect with the past participle.
Sentence-modifying adverb expressing relief/time (‘at last’).
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Beschäftigung’.
Attributive adjective, feminine accusative singular (mixed inflection after ‘eine’); modifies ‘Beschäftigung’.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; object of ‘gefunden’ (find).
Past participle (Partizip II) of the main verb; forms the Perfekt with ‘hat’.

sentences.target: Die Beschäftigung im Café macht ihm Spaß.
sentences.reading: /diː bəˈʃɛftɪɡʊŋ ɪm kaˈfeː maxt iːm ʃpaːs/

translations.de: Die Beschäftigung im Café macht ihm Spaß.
translations.ipa: /diː bəˈʃɛftɪɡʊŋ ɪm kaˈfeː maxt iːm ʃpaːs/
translations.en: The job at the café is fun for him.
translations.es: Le gusta su trabajo en la cafetería.
translations.fr: Son travail au café lui plaît.
translations.zh-Hans: 他很喜欢在咖啡馆的工作。
translations.yue: 佢好鍾意喺咖啡店嘅工作。
translations.pt: Ele gosta de trabalhar na cafeteria.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thích công việc ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Hij vindt zijn baan in het café leuk.
translations.hi: उसे कैफ़े में काम करना अच्छा लगता है.
translations.pl: Podoba mu się praca w kawiarni.
translations.el: Του αρέσει η δουλειά στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Han liker jobben sin på kafeen.
translations.ro: Îi place să lucreze la cafenea.
translations.da: Han kan godt lide sit arbejde på caféen.
translations.ja: 彼はカフェでの仕事が好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of ‘macht’.
Contraction of preposition ‘in’ + definite article ‘dem’; introduces a locative PP modifying ‘Beschäftigung’ and governs the dative.
Common noun, neuter dative singular; object of the preposition ‘im’.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject.
Personal pronoun, dative 3rd person singular; indirect object/experiencer in ‘Spaß machen’.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; internal object in the light-verb construction ‘Spaß machen’.

sentences.target: Für die Kinder brauchen wir eine Beschäftigung.
sentences.reading: /fyːɐ diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈbʁaʊ̯xən viːɐ ˈaɪ̯nə bəˈʃɛftɪɡʊŋ/

translations.de: Für die Kinder brauchen wir eine Beschäftigung.
translations.ipa: /fyːɐ diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈbʁaʊ̯xən viːɐ ˈaɪ̯nə bəˈʃɛftɪɡʊŋ/
translations.en: We need an activity for the kids.
translations.es: Necesitamos una actividad para los niños.
translations.fr: Il nous faut une activité pour les enfants.
translations.it: Ci serve un’attività per i bambini.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要给孩子们找个活动。
translations.yue: 我哋需要一個俾小朋友嘅活動。
translations.pt: Precisamos de uma atividade para as crianças.
translations.tr: Çocuklar için bir etkinliğe ihtiyacımız var.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cần một hoạt động cho bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: We hebben een activiteit voor de kinderen nodig.
translations.hu: Szükségünk van egy programra a gyerekeknek.
translations.hi: हमें बच्चों के लिए एक गतिविधि चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειαζόμαστε μια δραστηριότητα για τα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Vi trenger en aktivitet for barna.
translations.sv: Vi behöver en aktivitet för barnen.
translations.ro: Avem nevoie de o activitate pentru copii.
translations.da: Vi har brug for en aktivitet til børnene.
translations.ja: 子どもたちのための活動が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the accusative; heads a fronted PP.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of ‘Kinder’ after ‘für’.
Common noun, plural accusative; object of the preposition ‘für’.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes an accusative object.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of ‘brauchen’.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Beschäftigung’.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of ‘brauchen’.
